mapper.select: SELECT * FROM charging_session WHERE car_id = #{carId} AND session_status = '进行中' ORDER BY start_time DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT * FROM charging_session WHERE pile_id = #{pileId} AND session_status = '进行中' ORDER BY start_time DESC LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE charging_session SET end_time = #{endTime}, session_status = #{sessionStatus}, charge_amount = #{chargeAmount}, charge_duration = #{chargeDuration}, charge_fee = #{chargeFee}, service_fee = #{serviceFee}, total_fee = #{totalFee} WHERE session_id = #{sessionId}
